failedAssertions.reason: Promoted repository gate is not green at current HEAD: full_test failed with one app.test.ts failure, and mission API smoke checks returned HTTP 500 responses due to SQLITE_CORRUPT on ./data/opengecko.db.

milestoneChecks.title: Promoted repository gate is green at current HEAD

commands.observed: Full test gate failed: 509 passed, 1 failed. Failing test: tests/app.test.ts > preserves seeded bootstrap runtime semantics after listener-bound transition for a live local host override on port 3000; expected diagnostics hot_paths.shared_market_snapshot.source_class stale_live but received fresh_live.
Passed with 34 pre-existing warnings only; no lint errors.

observations: Current HEAD does not satisfy the promoted regression gate because the required full_test command is red.
Mission API readiness endpoint on :3001 is healthy and reports readiness.state=ready, degraded.active=false, shared_market_snapshot.available=true, source_class=fresh_live.
Validation API on :3102 is healthy and reports seeded_bootstrap validation state as expected.
Validation-only override routes remain hidden on :3001 (POST /diagnostics/runtime/degraded_state -> 404, POST /diagnostics/runtime/provider_failure -> 404).

milestoneChecks.title: Endpoint smoke harness is runnable against mission API

commands.observed: Harness ran and produced results, but failed 91 checks / passed 17 / skipped 1. Many user-facing endpoints returned HTTP 500 internal_server_error while /ping and some invalid-parameter checks passed.
Module smoke script ran but failed on GET /simple/price top-10 asset basket with HTTP 500.
Module smoke script ran but failed immediately on GET /coins/list with HTTP 500.
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error with {"error":"internal_server_error","message":"An unexpected error occurred."}.
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error with the same generic error envelope.
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error with the same generic error envelope.

observations: Smoke harness is executable in the mission environment, so the repo validation surface is runnable.
Expected milestone behavior is not satisfied because the runnable smoke harness fails broadly against the current :3001 service rather than confirming healthy endpoint behavior.

milestoneChecks.title: Environment is usable for repo gate validation

commands.observed: Readiness reports ready/fresh_live on mission API.
Validation API responds with starting/seeded_bootstrap runtime diagnostics.
Only pre-existing untracked files are present (.codex and docs/plans/*.md).

observations: Both assigned APIs are reachable without restarting services, satisfying the non-disruptive validation boundary.
The environment is usable for validation work, but usable infrastructure did not translate into a green promoted gate.
